item.title: Knowing about things is cheaper than knowing things 摘要
item.description:
The author reflects on the relationship between math and programming, arguing that while basic math like arithmetic is universally useful, advanced fields like algebra or calculus have low ROI for most programmers. However, every programmer works in a domain where some branch of math could be beneficial. The key is to gain broad exposure to many fields first, then go deep only on relevant ones. The author recommends non-honors undergraduate textbooks for broad learning and notes they'll be at Craft Conference Budapest next week.
标签: math, programming, education, learning, software engineering, career, productivity, conference

item.title: Footage From the LA-Houston MLS Match That Apple Shot Using iPhone 17 Pro Cameras 摘要
item.description:
Apple TV's MLS Wrap-Up show features highlights from the LA Galaxy vs. Houston Dynamo FC match that was shot exclusively using iPhone 17 Pro cameras. The footage, while impressive for a phone camera, does not match the quality of professional broadcasts. The author notes that fans might be annoyed if their team's match was used for such a stunt.
标签: Apple, iPhone, MLS, sports broadcasting, camera technology, Apple TV, footage quality, professional vs consumer
